title: PivotGroup
description: A single grouping (either row or column) in a pivot table.

sourceColumnOffset.description: The column offset of the source range that this grouping is based on.

showTotals.description: True if the pivot table should include the totals for this grouping.

sortOrder.description: The order the values in this group should be sorted.

repeatHeadings.description: True if the headings in this pivot group should be repeated.

label.description: The labels to use for the row/column groups which can be customized.
